title: goodyera × tanakae
intro: Goodyera × tanakae, also known as Tanaka's Goodyera, is a hybrid orchid species belonging to the Asclepiadoideae subfamily. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including relieving symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Goodyera × tanakae is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to make medicinal remedies.
